metadata.description: Advanced Claude Code plugins for enforced dev workflows and best practices.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Enforced dev workflow (/dev + /spec + /prd) with dual-model review, independent evaluator architecture, AC-based module progress formula, aligned §N.M section numbering, git auto-sync with LLM-generated commit messages, opt-in statusline, `/spec upgrade-template` for template migration preserving /dev verification progress, and `/prd` skill for iterative PRD generation with 4-dimension coverage evaluator. MODULE template gains §1.1 Serves PRD topics, §2.13 Operations, §2.14 Observability. Adds /dev PLAN routing via CONTEXT-MAP + domain-term resolution via GLOSSARY (auto-generated by /spec and /prd). **2.5.0** adds ADR system. **2.6.0** tightens /prd scope discipline (Phase 4 Dimension 4 architecture-leakage detection, optional template sub-sections §1.1 Design principles + §7.1 Milestones, Phase 3.0 boundary block). **2.7.0** adds upstream-alignment escape hatches: /dev DOCS §2.1.2 (PRD/Spec upstream change check — abort+restart), §2.1.3 (Core Logic drift check — re-entry-only §2.7 alignment audit), /spec Phase 0.6 (PRD-gap escalation — formalizes /spec Iron Rule upstream-rollback path). **2.8.0** adds worktree-parallel /dev support: 4 subcommands (`worktree-new` / `worktree-list` / `worktree-finish` / `worktree-remove`) backed by `plugins/dev/bin/worktree-helper.sh`. Each worktree naturally gets its own `.dev-state/` via the existing `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` lookup. 2.7.0 §2.1.2 Option A (4 commands) and Option B (3 commands) sequences UNCHANGED — worktree-mode bridging (cd + git commit + git rebase using LOCAL ref via shared `.git/` object store) lives in §8.2 narrative, not as alternative commands. /spec + /prd stay single-flight; §8 documents main-worktree-only convention + 5-gate stop.sh auto-push reality + `.git/index.lock` contention as accepted operational quirks.

plugins.name: claude-best-practice
plugins.description: Claude Code best practices: explore-plan-code discipline, verification-first development, context management, prompt scoping, and session strategy.

plugins.name: code-companion
plugins.description: macOS Dynamic Island for code agents. Floating status pill shows pending approvals and active sessions from Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI. Click to jump to terminal.
